docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40-WAIVED) SERVED MAY-09-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, TERENCE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ANA RAMIREZ IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT TERENCE SMITH IS PRESENT. MATTER IS CALLED AT 11:45 A.M. DUE TO THE LATENESS OF THE CALLING OF THIS MATTER AND THE COURT INTERPRETER'S AVAILABILITY, THIS MATTER IS PUT OVER TO BE HEARD AT 1:30 P.M. ON THE SAME DAY. MATTER IS RECALLED AT 1:50 P.M. ALL PARTIES WERE PREVIOUSLY SWORN IN AT 10:00 AM AND REMAIN UNDER OATH. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, ANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SMITH, TERENCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $40-WAIVED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, ANA AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, TERENCE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, ANA AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, TERENCE

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, ANA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, ANA AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, TERENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 **CORRECTION OF DEFENDANT'S MAILING ADDRESS** FILED BY RAMIREZ, ANA AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, TERENCE
